Mtn To Compel Contractual Arbitration
Off Calendar Jan-15-2003 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Timothy J. Arneson, Esq. of HINES & THOMAS 981-2623, for defendant Bank of America moving to compel contractual arbitration
No other appearance
The Court did not adopt its tentative ruling. The motion was unopposed and the Court recused itself but tentatively granted defendant Bank of America's motion to compel contractual arbitration and referred the matter to the Hon. RONALD E. QUIDACHAY for final determination. (DAG/301) Reporter: Joe Vickstein, CSR 4780
* January 28, 2003 The Hon. Ronald E. Quidachay reviewed the Reporter's Transcript of the January 15th proceeding. Counsel's proposed Order was also reviewed and signed in chambers.
